projects.name: Autonomous Drone Navigation
projects.summary: Developed obstacle avoidance firmware for custom quadcopter with sensor fusion and real-time control loop. Deployed on Raspberry Pi 4 with 50Hz control frequency. Won 2nd place at Purdue Robotics Competition 2025.

projects.name: Smart Irrigation System
projects.summary: Built IoT soil-moisture monitoring network with 8 Arduino Mega nodes and central Raspberry Pi hub. Implemented C firmware for sensor data acquisition and MQTT transmission. Deployed on 0.5 acres of greenhouse with automated valve control.

projects.name: Custom RTOS Scheduler
projects.summary: Implemented preemptive RTOS kernel with round-robin scheduling, semaphores, mutexes, and priority inheritance. Validated with oscilloscope measurements achieving <5μs context switch overhead.

impact_highlights.description: Autonomous Drone Navigation system achieved 50Hz control loop frequency on Raspberry Pi 4 with real-time kernel, enabling stable obstacle avoidance with LiDAR and IMU sensor fusion.
impact_highlights.metric: 50Hz control loop, <5μs context switch overhead (from RTOS project)

impact_highlights.description: Smart Irrigation System deployed across 0.5 acres of greenhouse plants with automated water management.
Won 2nd place at Purdue Robotics Competition 2025 for autonomous drone navigation project.
